comments: Zeister, Afflicted and Sly Dog Glen were the bands featured in Rock War on this programme.
The show had an interview with Glen Danzig of Danzig.
The audio of this show is incomplete and contains only the interview with Glen Danzig, as well as three songs that were largely edited out.  The Badlands live performance has also been added.

sessions.artist: Badlands (live performance from the American band
sessions.details: Not to be confused with the British band of the same name, who did a FRS session in 1984)

track_listing.track: Am I Demon (album - Danzig) Def American
